ground_truths.semantic_hint: Object detection ground-truth tensor encoding bounding box coordinates and class labels per image. Used as y_true in YoloLoss and all custom metrics/losses. Parsed from annotation text files where each line has bounding boxes as comma-separated [x1,y1,x2,y2,class] groups.

proposed_mapping.name: image_encoder
proposed_mapping.notes: preprocess.py provides image_paths; config.yml defines IMAGE_SIZE=[448,640]; no in-repo loader code found so encoder must be authored.; Loads an image from GCS path, resizes to [448, 640], normalizes, and returns float32 tensor of shape (448, 640, 3).

proposed_mapping.name: gt_encoder
proposed_mapping.notes: preprocess.py parses bbox annotations as lists of [x1,y1,x2,y2,class]; metrics.py passes y_true to true_coords_labels and YoloLoss expecting a specific tensor layout.; Encodes per-image bounding box annotations (from label_data parsed in preprocess.py) into a padded tensor of shape (MAX_BB_PER_IMAGE, 5+) compatible with code_loader's YoloLoss y_true format.

unknowns: This repository contains NO PyTorch code. It is a TensorFlow/Tensorleap integration project. The lead pack signals (batch_unpack_loop) were false positives from enumerate loops in a confusion-matrix metric.
The leap_binder entry point (typically defining input/gt/prediction encoders and dataset subset callbacks) is not present in this 4-file repo subset.
Model architecture definition is absent; only inference/loss evaluation code is present.
Image loading, resizing, and normalization logic is not in-repo — likely in an absent leap_binder or data pipeline file.
